{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120011AB6C57536719E06DEB28"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7278589897103164215","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"反转，反转，反转，反转，再反转。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694680081,"group_id":"7278128212469615631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"时来运转，运气终究会轮到我一次的！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/pFWop91snQMdBh0W/8LBs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"460060644606976","user_name":"有户口的马"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"460060644606976","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7278128212469615631","book_info":{"abstract":"[都市，热血，杀伐果断，打脸不隔夜，不圣母，搞笑]
我爹本事大，但是我不拼爹。
我家很有钱，但是我不炫富。
手里有外挂，就是不用就是玩儿。
吴凡，老爸是科学巨匠，米国必杀榜首位，悬赏800亿，神秘失踪。
吴凡，自以为是的考神二代，手无缚鸡之力的装逼犯，家庭变故之后，被绿茶甩，被朋友欺，被大佬利用…。
得到父亲留下的麒麟心，昆仑镜，体魄无限强大，时间无无限拉伸，昆仑境内1万年，现实只有一秒钟。
遭绿茶陷害，开除学籍，永不录用。
凭借逆天外挂，逆势崛起，争取留校旁听的资格。对那些不怀好意的人光速打脸。确立了自己的地位。
大夏强基计划中，脱颖而出，勇夺桂冠，成为青木城的永久公民，拥有一次犯罪豁免权!少年热血!重振大夏神威!
简单的事情不要找我，无难度，不渣哥！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o508451e4013b69049471d5058aaa1527~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"有户口的马","author_id":"","book_id":"7278128212469615631","book_name":"我强的有点离谱，校花成笑话！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#703800","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7278129528323604992","read_count":"0","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"520922"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"187","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,多女主,校花,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc8dace12fd2f83940ca39bfdb747e2a1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779249611&x-signature=LHeSkPMsNLLKHKt2cY5iK15MBxc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"460060644606976","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"0"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120011AB6C57536719E06DEB28"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":96},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1694680130
